Explanation: Using selectFrom(ACCOUNTS) fetches all columns from the ACCOUNTS table, which can retrieve unnecessary data and impact performance. Consider explicitly selecting only the columns needed, e.g., dslContext.select(ACCOUNTS.ID, ACCOUNTS.BALANCE, ...).from(ACCOUNTS).fetch().

Using selectFrom(ACCOUNTS) fetches all columns from the ACCOUNTS table when only specific fields may be needed. Consider selecting only the required columns explicitly, such as dslContext.select(ACCOUNTS.ID, ACCOUNTS.BALANCE).from(ACCOUNTS).
